extraction.one_line_summary: BOUHANNI Nacer won from reduced bunch sprint after late split caused by roadside furniture, Viviani boxed out of position
tactical_patterns: Team Sky and EF Education First moved to front 3+ km out anticipating street furniture danger, avoiding crash
Quick-Step lost lead-out train when Sabatini crashed on bollards, leaving Viviani isolated in final 500m
Bouhanni changed positioning strategy from previous day, entering final km independently rather than relying on train

rider_signals.BOUHANNI Nacer: positive: admitted anger over previous day criticism motivated tactical adjustment, proved veteran sprint positioning skills
rider_signals.VIVIANI Elia: negative: lost lead-out when Sabatini crashed, got boxed out despite making front split showing positioning vulnerability
rider_signals.PORT Richie: neutral: joined three-man break only to collect KOM points, team allowed polite maximum point-taking
rider_signals.LAENGEN Vegard: negative: caught behind furniture crash, wasted energy chasing back compromising UAE sprint support
rider_signals.BENNETT George: positive: positioned safely in front group despite team not mentioned among proactive safety-first squads
